common.characterPriority: 🎮 Character selection: {player} chooses first (lost previous round)
common.characterPriorityFirst: 🎮 First match between these players — no character priority
common.confirmDeletePlayer: Are you sure you want to delete this player?
common.confirmDeleteTournament: Are you sure you want to delete this tournament?
common.confirmRemovePlayer: Are you sure you want to remove this player?
common.addAtLeastOnePlayer: Please add at least one player
common.totalRoundsMustBe4Or0: Scores must be 4 total (or 0-0 to clear)
common.selectWinnerForAllRaces: Please select a winner for all {count} races
common.mrFourRaceDrawNote: MR qualification always records 4 races. A 2-2 draw is a valid result.
common.samePositionError: Both players cannot finish in the same position in a race
common.autoDistributeDesc: Distribute players to groups by seeding (snake pattern)
common.mismatchTooltip: Both players reported different scores — admin review needed
common.tiedRanksWarningAdmin: Tied ranks detected — record the sudden-death playoff result
common.tiedRanksWarningViewer: Tied ranks detected — awaiting admin resolution
common.playoffDialogDescription: Arrange players from highest to lowest finish, then save the final order.
common.qualificationConfirmedDesc: Scores are locked. Unlock to allow edits.
common.confirmQualificationDialog: Are you sure you want to confirm qualification? Score editing will be locked for all players and admins.
common.qualificationLocked: Qualification results are confirmed. Score editing is locked.
common.resetBracketConfirm: Reset bracket? All existing finals and playoff data will be deleted.

auth.subtitle: Japan SMK Championship
auth.playerLoginHelp: Players: log in with your nickname and password
auth.oauthSigninError: An error occurred during OAuth sign-in.
auth.oauthCallbackError: An error occurred during OAuth callback.
auth.oauthCreateAccountError: An error occurred during account creation.
auth.emailCreateAccountError: An error occurred during email account creation.
auth.accessDeniedError: Access denied. This may be a temporary error. Please try again later.
auth.notWhitelistedError: This Discord account is not registered as an administrator.
auth.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.accountNotLinkedError: This email is already linked to another provider.
auth.sessionRequiredError: A session is required for this operation.
auth.accessDeniedHelp: A communication error with the server may have occurred. Please try logging in again after some time.
auth.notWhitelistedHelp: If you need admin access, please contact a tournament administrator.
auth.serverErrorHelp: A database or server communication error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.accountNotLinkedHelp: Please verify you are a member of jsmdc-org.

players.title: Players
players.noPlayersAdmin: No players registered yet. Add your first player to get started.
players.savePasswordWarning: Save this password securely. It will only be shown once.
players.passwordNote: Please provide this password to the player. They can use it to log in with their nickname.
players.cannotDeleteTournamentPlayer: Cannot delete: this player is registered in a tournament
players.confirmResetPassword: Are you sure you want to reset the password for this player?
players.fetchError: Failed to load players. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name:
profile.playerSessionDescription: This is the player account attached to the current login session.
profile.canSubmitScores: You can now submit scores for this player.
profile.noPlayerSession: No player information is attached to this session.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.dualReportEnabled: Enable Dual Report (both players must confirm scores)
tournaments.taPlayerSelfEdit: Allow players to edit their own TA times (disable for partner-only entry)
tournaments.noTournamentsAdmin: No tournaments created yet. Create your first tournament to get started.
tournaments.name: Name
tournaments.fetchError: Failed to load tournaments. Please try again.
tournaments.customUrlHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Leave blank to use the generated ID.

ta.title: Time Trial
ta.qualificationDesc: Top 12 advance to finals • Top 13-16 to Phase 2 • Top 17-24 to Phase 1
ta.selectPlayersToAdd: Check the players to add to the qualification round.
ta.setupPlayersDesc: Select players for the qualification round. Assign seeding and pair partners in one place.
ta.editPlayersDesc: Update the qualification roster. Checking adds a player; unchecking removes their entry. Seeding and pair partners save together.
ta.noPlayersYet: No players added yet. Click "Add Player" to begin.
ta.qualificationRegistrationLocked: Players cannot be added to qualification after the knockout stage starts.
ta.removeQualificationEntryDesc: This only removes the player from TT qualification. The player record is not deleted, but this qualification entry's times, rank, and pair assignment will be removed. You can add the player again from Add Player if needed.
ta.removeQualificationEntrySuccess: {nickname} was removed from TT qualification. You can add the player again from Add Player if needed.
ta.removeQualificationEntryError: Failed to remove player from TT qualification
ta.timeEntryDesc: Enter times for each player (format: M:SS.mm)
ta.enterTimeCourseDesc: Enter time for each course (format: M:SS.mm, e.g., 1:23.45)
ta.stageFrozen: This stage is frozen. Time edits are not allowed.
ta.managePairsDesc: §3.1: Assign pairs for pair running. Auto-pair uses snake seeding (balanced skill matching).

bm.title: Battle Mode
bm.setupDialogDesc: Assign players to groups for the group stage round.
bm.noGroupsYet: No groups set up yet. Click "Setup Groups" to begin.
bm.noGroupsYetViewer: No groups set up yet. Please wait until the setup is complete.
bm.editGroupsDesc: Modify player group assignments. Existing match results will be regenerated.

mr.title: Match Race
mr.qualificationDesc: 4-race fixed-course round robin with score entry by race results
mr.setupDialogDesc: Assign players to groups for the group stage round.
mr.noGroupsYet: No groups set up yet. Click "Setup Groups" to begin.
mr.noGroupsYetViewer: No groups set up yet. Please wait until the setup is complete.
mr.editGroupsDesc: Modify player group assignments. Existing match results will be regenerated.

gp.title: Grand Prix
gp.setupDialogDesc: Assign players to groups for the group stage round.
gp.manualTotalScoreDesc: Use this when you only need to correct the cup total after play ends.
gp.manualScoreValidation: Manual total scores must be non-negative integers.
gp.manualScoreSaveFailed: Failed to save the manual total score.
gp.noGroupsYet: No groups set up yet. Click "Setup Groups" to begin.
gp.noGroupsYetViewer: No groups set up yet. Please wait until the setup is complete.
gp.editGroupsDesc: Modify player group assignments. Existing match results will be regenerated.

finals.generateBracketDesc: Generate a bracket to start finals tournament.
finals.bracketExplanation: The finals bracket will be generated using the top 8 players from qualification standings. The bracket uses a double elimination format:
finals.losersBracketDesc: Players with one loss get a second chance
finals.resetMatchDesc: If Losers champion wins Grand Final, a reset match determines the true champion
finals.gpTieNeedsWinner: Select the sudden-death winner when GP points are tied
finals.startCourseDesc: Battle courses rotate: BC1→BC2→BC3→BC4. Select starting course for this match.
finals.generateConfirmDesc: This will create a double elimination bracket using top 8 players from qualification round. Make sure all qualification matches are completed.
finals.resetConfirmDesc: This will delete all existing finals matches and create a new bracket. This action cannot be undone.
finals.fiveRacesDesc: Each match consists of 5 unique courses
finals.firstTo3Desc: First player to win 3 races wins the match

match.selectIdentity: Select who you are and enter the match result
match.selectIdentityRace: Select who you are and enter the race results
match.waitingConfirm: Waiting for the other player to confirm...
match.selectPlayer: Please select which player you are
match.notAuthorized: You are not authorized to enter scores for this match. Please log in as one of the players.

participant.loginToReport: Please log in with your player credentials to report scores
participant.loginToAccess: Please log in with your player credentials to access score entry
participant.loginToEnterTimes: Please log in with your player credentials to enter times
participant.loginHelp: Use the nickname and password provided by the tournament organizer.
participant.tournamentNotFoundDesc: The requested tournament could not be loaded
participant.noPendingBM: You don't have any pending battle mode matches. Check back later for new matches.
participant.noPendingMR: You don't have any pending match races. Check back later for new matches.
participant.noPendingGP: You don't have any pending Grand Prix matches. Check back later for new matches.
participant.noRacesYet: No races added yet. Click "Add Race" to begin.
participant.scoresReportedSuccess: Scores reported successfully! Both players must report matching scores for confirmation.
participant.matchReportedSuccess: Match result reported successfully! Both players must report matching results for confirmation.
participant.enterBothScores: Please enter both scores before submitting.
participant.addAtLeastOneRace: Please add at least one race result.
participant.securityNotice: You are logged in as a tournament participant. All score entries are logged and verified. Please ensure you're reporting accurate results for fair competition.
participant.grandPrixDesc: Report your cup-based driver's points results
participant.timeTrialDesc: Enter your course times and verify results
participant.notRegisteredTADesc: You are not registered for the time attack competition in this tournament.
participant.invalidTimeFormat: Invalid time format for {course}. Please use M:SS.mm format (e.g., 1:23.45)
participant.invalidTime: Invalid time for {course}. Time must be positive.
participant.enterAtLeastOne: Please enter at least one course time.
participant.qualificationEditingLockedAfterKnockout: After the knockout stage starts, only admins can edit qualification times.
participant.selfEditDisabled: Self-editing is disabled for this tournament. Your partner will enter your times.
participant.qualificationLocked: Qualification results are confirmed. Score editing is locked.

overall.title: Overall Ranking
overall.subtitle: Total points across all 4 modes
overall.rankedByTotal: {count} players ranked by total tournament points
overall.taQualPoints: TA: Linear interpolation by course rank (50 pts/course max)

taFinals.livesResetNotice: Lives have been reset to 3 for all remaining {count} players!
taFinals.enterTimesDesc: Enter times for all active players. Bottom half will lose 1 life.
taFinals.cancelRoundDesc: This will delete the round record and return the course ({course}) to the available pool. This action cannot be undone.
taFinals.startRoundDesc: Start a new round with a randomly selected course
taFinals.eliminatePlayerDesc: This will mark {player} as eliminated. This action cannot be undone.
taFinals.noFinalsDesc: Complete Phase 1 and Phase 2, then promote players to Phase 3.
taFinals.phase2Desc: Phase 1 survivors + Qualification ranks 13-16 (8 players → 4 survivors)
taFinals.undoRoundDesc: This will clear the results of the last submitted round and restore player status to before that round. The course will remain assigned so you can re-enter times.

revival.startCoursesManage: Start courses and manage elimination tournament
revival.enterTimesSlowEliminated: Enter times for all remaining players. Slowest player(s) will be eliminated.
revival.needAtLeast2Times: Need at least 2 valid times to compare
revival.noPlayersRound1Desc: Complete qualification round and promote players 17-24 to revival round 1.
revival.noPlayersRound2Desc: Complete qualification round and revival round 1, then promote players to revival round 2.

taElimination.enterTimesDesc: Enter times for all active players. The slowest player will be eliminated.
taElimination.cancelRoundDesc: This will delete the round record and return the course ({course}) to the available pool. This action cannot be undone.
taElimination.startRoundDesc: Start a new round with a randomly selected course
taElimination.noPlayersDesc: Promote players from the qualification stage first.
taElimination.invalidTimeFor: Invalid time for {player}. Enter M:SS.mm format.
taElimination.needAtLeast2Players: Need at least 2 players to submit results
taElimination.undoRoundDesc: This will clear the results of the last submitted round and restore player status to before that round. The course will remain assigned so you can re-enter times.

errors.fetchError: Unable to load data. Please refresh the page.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
